post_tool_use.description: Warn if a tool modifies files in knowledge-base/raw/
post_tool_use.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'knowledge-base/raw/' && [ "$TOOL_NAME" != "Read" ] && [ "$TOOL_NAME" != "Glob" ] && [ "$TOOL_NAME" != "Grep" ]; then echo 'WARNING: raw/ is immutable. Do not modify source files in knowledge-base/raw/. Only read operations are permitted.'; exit 1; fi
